features: 【Ultra-smooth Surface】This mousepad is made of superfine fiber braided material.Mouse can be quickly moved and accurately positioned on the slick surface.This mouse pad can also be used to wipe the computer screen.
【Washable Design】 When your mouse pad is dirty, you can wash it off with water. Very convenient.
【Wide Applicability】Available for all types of mouse,Ideal size for daily use.
【Easy to carry】This mouse pad is light and easy to carry. Easy to fold, suitable for travel.
